session.user: Run prettier --check on the following files and report results: - docs/learned/architecture/git-plumbing-patterns.md - docs/learned/cli/land-learn-integration.md - docs/learned/cli/workflow-run-list.md - docs/learned/tui/tui-command-registration.md
session.assistant: I'll run prettier check on those files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check prettier formatting on 4 markdown files

session.tool_result: Checking formatting... All matched files use Prettier code style!
session.assistant:
prettier passed: All 4 files use correct Prettier code style.
